title: Redirect Cloudways Direct Access to Production Domain
description: Redirect all direct access to the Cloudways server domain (phplaravel-1018118-3598086.cloudwaysapps.com) back to the production domain (https://app.datatoolspro.com/). This prevents users and bots from accessing the application through the raw Cloudways hostname.
acceptance_criteria: Requests to the Cloudways domain are redirected to app.datatoolspro.com
Redirect applies to all paths on the Cloudways domain
Production domain continues to function normally
implementation_notes: Can be implemented via .htaccess redirect rule or Laravel middleware checking the HTTP_HOST header.
